core_interpretation: The file provides the correct inference philosophy and policies, but only one hidden state is fully expanded; the remaining required hidden states are listed but not materialized.
missing_elements: full candidate hidden-state matrix for all required hidden states
next measurement recommendations for each state

global_rules.rule_name: No single-marker inference unless risk flag
Unknown data is not negative evidence

guardrails: Do not infer hidden states from one marker alone unless explicitly single-source risk flag.
Medication/context/environmental overrides must be checked before biological inference.
High confidence requires temporal alignment of input marker, mediator/context and outcome.
Unknown or missing data is not negative evidence.
recommendation: Keep as scaffold; generate manual v2 from all completed source trees.
